nodes.label: Home idle state — ritual + aprendizaje del día empty states with nudge buttons
nodes.description: Home screen in idle/inactive state. Top bar shows app blocker active: '3 apps fuera de tu mente' badge (teal), mode label 'Descanso', and three blocked apps (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) with X dismiss chips. Two main empty-state sections: (1) 'Tu ritual de hoy' with subtitle 'Sin rutinas — agrega las que quieres practicar' and a '+' button row 'Configurar rutinas del ritual' (subtitle: Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más). (2) 'Mi aprendizaje del día' with subtitle 'Agrega contenido de Explorar para esta sesión' and a '+' button row 'Agregar contenido al día' (subtitle: Audiolibros, charlas y meditaciones de Explorar). 'Recordatorios' section below with '4 activos': Meditar 5 min (07:30, Diario), Hidratarse (cada 90min, Diario), Cierre del dia (21:55, Diario), Llamar a mamá (21:00), with '+ Agregar recordatorio' CTA at bottom. Screenshot name 'button-nudge-check' implies this is a design check for nudge button styling/placement.
nodes.ui_screen: Home — idle state with ritual + aprendizaje empty states

nodes.label: App blocker — Descanso mode with Instagram, TikTok, YouTube blocked
nodes.description: In the Descanso (rest/break) mode, three social media apps are shown as blocked: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube. The top status bar shows '3 apps fuera de tu mente' with a teal badge and 'Descanso' label. Each blocked app appears as a dismissible chip. This demonstrates that app blocking is active even in rest mode, not just during focus sessions.
